001package entityClasses;
002
003import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
004import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
005
006import java.util.List;
007
008import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;
009import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse;
010import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNull;
011import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;
012
013class ReplyListTest {
014
015    private ReplyList replyList;
016    private PostList postList;
017
018    @BeforeEach
019    void setUp() {
020        replyList = new ReplyList();
021        postList = new PostList();
022        postList.createPost(new Post(10, "Question", "Need help", "CSE360", "student10", false));
023    }
024
025    @Test
026    void createReplyForPost_rollsBackWhenPostMissing() {
027        Reply orphan = new Reply(1, 999, "I can answer this", "staff01");
028        assertEquals("Reply must reference an existing post.", replyList.createReplyForPost(orphan, postList));
029        assertTrue(replyList.readAllReplies().isEmpty());
030    }
031
032    @Test
033    void createReply_rejectsDuplicateId() {
034        Reply first = new Reply(2, 10, "First answer", "staff01");
035        assertNull(replyList.createReplyForPost(first, postList));
036
037        Reply duplicate = new Reply(2, 10, "Duplicate id", "staff02");
038        assertEquals("Reply ID already exists.", replyList.createReplyForPost(duplicate, postList));
039    }
040
041    @Test
042    void updateReply_validatesAndTrimsBody() {
043        Reply reply = new Reply(3, 10, "Initial", "staff03");
044        assertNull(replyList.createReplyForPost(reply, postList));
045
046        assertEquals("Reply body is required.", replyList.updateReply(3, "   "));
047        assertNull(replyList.updateReply(3, "  Updated reply  "));
048        assertEquals("Updated reply", replyList.readReplyById(3).getBody());
049    }
050
051    @Test
052    void deleteReply_returnsExpectedBoolean() {
053        assertFalse(replyList.deleteReply(999));
054
055        Reply reply = new Reply(4, 10, "Delete me", "staff04");
056        assertNull(replyList.createReplyForPost(reply, postList));
057        assertTrue(replyList.deleteReply(4));
058    }
059
060    @Test
061    void subsetKeywordFiltersRepliesCaseInsensitive() {
062        replyList.createReplyForPost(new Reply(5, 10, "Use Maven test", "staff05"), postList);
063        replyList.createReplyForPost(new Reply(6, 10, "Use JavaFX controls", "staff06"), postList);
064
065        replyList.setSubsetFromKeyword("maven");
066        List<Reply> subset = replyList.readSubsetReplies();
067        assertEquals(1, subset.size());
068        assertEquals(5, subset.get(0).getReplyId());
069
070        replyList.clearSubset();
071        assertTrue(replyList.readSubsetReplies().isEmpty());
072    }
073}
